items.content_html: All my dotfiles, using Neovim with PowerShell Core in Wezterm along with fzf and a wrapper for it for fast navigation. Additionally, there is a quick setup for Firefox with Tridactyl and for a Tiling Window Manager using Komorebi with Yasb and AutoHotkey.
items.title: ConnorSweeneyDev/Windows11Workflow: All my dotfiles, using Neovim with PowerShell Core in Wezterm along with fzf and a wrapper for it for fast navigation. Additionally, there is a quick setup for Firefox with Tridactyl and for a Tiling Window Manager using Komorebi with Yasb and AutoHotkey.

items.content_html: MemoryReader is an AutoHotkey v2 class for reading memory from running programs on Windows. It includes methods for calculating dynamic memory addresses and reading data, making it ideal for real-time monitoring, debugging, or game stats access. Use responsibly and with appropriate permissions.
items.title: MatheusHeenrique/MemoryReader: MemoryReader is an AutoHotkey v2 class for reading memory from running programs on Windows. It includes methods for calculating dynamic memory addresses and reading data, making it ideal for real-time monitoring, debugging, or game stats access. Use responsibly and with appropriate permissions.
